name: Hot Dogs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, grind the chick peas and bread together until well combined.
2. Mix in the egg substitute, garlic, red peppers, salt, and pepper until fully incorporated.
3. Shape the mixture into finger-length rolls and chill for 1 hour to allow the dough to set.
4. Heat oil in a deep fryer to 370°F (180°C).
5. Carefully drop the hot dog rolls into the hot oil.
6. Fry until golden brown, then drain on paper towels.
7. Serve with mustard or hot chili sauce. Makes about 20 servings.
